      🎪

      Welcome to Fliporium

      A private little place for you and the people you care about. Pick how you'd like to start:

      • Rooms are private spaces — make one, then share its invite link so friends can join (up to 16).
      • People on the left turn green when they're online. Click one to chat one-to-one.
      • Flip a file by dragging it onto a chat — it lands right on their device, no size limit.
      • Stuck? Hit Help at the top right anytime.
        replying to:
        drop to flip
        🎪

        Pick a name

        What should people see when you chat? It's just a label — you can change it anytime in Backstage.

        🎪

        Welcome to Fliporium

        A small private place for you and the people you care about.

        How Fliporium works

        The basics

        • The Floor (left) is your home — your Rooms at the top, People below.
        • A Room is a private group space. Make one with the +, then send its invite link so others can join (up to 16 people).
        • People turn green when they're online — click to chat one-to-one. Right-click someone to message privately or block them.

        Sharing things

        • Flip = send a file: drag it onto a chat, or use the flip button. There's no size limit.
        • Catch = the files you receive — images, video, audio, PDFs and text preview right inline.

        Good to know

        • No account, no signup. Everything is end-to-end encrypted, straight between devices.
        • Ctrl+K searches all your messages. Esc closes any popup.
        • Use the filter box on The Floor to find a room or person fast.
        • Backstage holds your picture, theme, sounds, and a way to wipe everything.
        Full docs ↗
        Backstage

        You

        Friends see your picture next to your name. PNG, JPG, or GIF.

        Theme

        Sounds

        Twin Mode

        Pair another of your devices to keep 1:1 chat history in sync.

        Invite a friend

        Open a room on The Floor (or create one with the + next to Rooms), then hit “copy invite link” at the top of the room and send it to whoever you want. They paste it into the “join” box and they're in.

        Blocked

        Blocked people can't connect to you in any room, and you won't see their messages. Unblock anytime.

        Help

        Danger zone

        Permanently wipe this device's chat history, identity, caught files, and settings. Other peers' copies are untouched. No undo.
